title: YALLOVE Metal Question Mark Balloon Column for Baby Gender Reveal, 2.35m Height Adjustable Balloon Arch Stand Kit, Frame Backdrop for Boy or Girl Party Decoration
features: ASY TO INSTALL - Our product package comes with a user guide and installation videos, you can easily install a beautiful balloon question mark like a breeze whether having experience or not
METAL MATERIAL - Made of high-quality metal material, it's durable without rust. And the shiny gold adds sparkle to your gender reveal party

BEAUTY & REUSABLE - Compared use a hula hoop to DIY the question mark, our question mark is more beautiful, convenient, and can be used many times. Whether it is for yourself or your friends, it is the best choice
STABLE - Our metal stand kit and 10 lb weight water bag provide good stability, it's sturdy and tip-resistant, suitable for indoor and outdoor activities
WHAT DO YOU NEED PREPARE - It is recommended to prepare an electric balloon pump and any type of balloon with 50-100pcs, then you can start setting up your question mark balloon column
description: Specifications Material: Iron Color: White Overall Height: 2.3m Overall Width: 1m Item Weight: 1.5kg Assembly Required: Yes Assembly Instruction: Included
